upstream_train_gpt_note: Presets only set environment variables read by the stock openai/train_gpt.py Hyperparameters class. Anything requiring recurrence, custom quantization, sliding-window eval, or record-local train_gpt.py is NOT env-only — implement in a records/ folder for real SOTA attempts.

quick_protocol.comment: Short training for screening. Val still uses full val split at end unless you patch train_gpt.py.

presets.notes: Default model shape from starter (9 layers, etc.).
GQA-style: fewer KV heads (case matrix lane_2 direction).
Matches theme from records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-18_LowerLR — often improves stability.
Deeper model; may exceed 16MB for real submission without compression tricks — screening only.
Longer context (see LongContextSeq2048 record); slower — use longer wallclock for real runs.
Affects TTT LoRA eval path if that eval is active in your run.

lanes_not_env_only.lane_1: Recurrence + train-time LoRA + gating: not in stock Hyperparameters; needs forked train_gpt.py.
lanes_not_env_only.lane_3: QAT / compression-reg: not in upstream starter env list.
lanes_not_env_only.lane_4: Tokenizer swap: set TOKENIZER_PATH/VOCAB_SIZE only if you have another .model on disk.
lanes_not_env_only.lane_6: Entropy / MDL: typically custom loss or routing — code change.
lanes_not_env_only.lane_7: Muon WD / spectral init: often in winning records as code edits, not a single env.
lanes_not_env_only.lane_8: Sliding-window or eval hacks: custom forward in record train_gpt.py.
lanes_not_env_only.lane_10: Often LR + schedule; partial coverage via *_LR envs only.
